001import java.util.StringTokenizer;
002
003/**
004 * Turns a single input line into a {@link Command} for the adventure game.
005 * <p>
006 * The first token becomes the command word; the second token (if any) is kept as
007 * the command's second word. Additional tokens on the same line are ignored.
008 * Unknown first words yield a command whose {@link Command#getCommandWord()} is
009 * {@code null} so that {@link Command#isUnknown()} is {@code true}.
010 * </p>
011 *
012 * @author Michael Kolling and David J. Barnes + D. Bureau
013 * @version 2008.03.30 + 2013.09.15
014 */
015public class Parser
016{
017    /** Catalogue of valid primary command words. */
018    private CommandWords aValidCW;
019
020    /**
021     * Prepares the internal {@link CommandWords} table used during parsing.
022     */
023    public Parser()
024    {
025        this.aValidCW = new CommandWords();
026    } // Parser()
027
028    /**
029     * Tokenizes {@code pInputLine} and builds the corresponding {@link Command}.
030     *
031     * @param pInputLine raw user text; may be {@code null}, empty, or multi-word
032     * @return a populated {@link Command}, possibly marked unknown
033     */
034    public Command getCommand( final String pInputLine )
035    {
036        String vWord1;
037        String vWord2;
038
039        StringTokenizer tokenizer = new StringTokenizer( pInputLine );
040
041        if ( tokenizer.hasMoreTokens() )
042            vWord1 = tokenizer.nextToken();
043        else
044            vWord1 = null;
045
046        if ( tokenizer.hasMoreTokens() )
047            vWord2 = tokenizer.nextToken();
048        else
049            vWord2 = null;
050
051        if ( this.aValidCW.isCommand( vWord1 ) )
052            return new Command( vWord1, vWord2 );
053        else
054            return new Command( null, vWord2 );
055    } // getCommand()
056
057    /**
058     * Returns a space-separated list of all valid command words.
059     *
060     * @return human-readable command summary suitable for help text
061     */
062    public String getCommandString()
063    {
064        return this.aValidCW.getCommandList();
065    } // getCommandString()
066} // Parser
